criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience, such as through personalized recommendations, chatbots, or content moderation.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer documentation, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Base
criteria.description: The number of active users on the platform, indicating its popularity and reach.
criteria.sources: Company reports, market research studies, app store statistics.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and quality of features offered by the app, including messaging, video calls, content sharing, and community building tools.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, user reviews, developer documentation.

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: The measures implemented by the app to protect user data and ensure secure communication.
criteria.sources: Privacy policies, security audits, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and activity within the app, such as daily active users, session length, and content creation rates.
criteria.sources: Company reports, market research studies, app analytics.
